case_title: JEAN CLAUDE LAIR VS. JAMES HALPERN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HALPERN, JAMES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALPERN, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1388 CALIFORNIA STREET, #410, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HALPERN, JAMES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE SERVED OCT-14-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HALPERN, JAMES
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.37 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE AS TO DEFENDANT HALPERN, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HALPERN, JAMES
